title: Callback Phishing & RMM Persistence Defense
subtitle: GTR-2025 callback phishing detection and unauthorized RMM tool containment

steps.title: Callback Phishing Email
steps.description: Fake invoice/subscription email with callback phone number delivered.

steps.title: Phone Social Engineering
steps.description: Victim calls fake support and is guided to install RMM tool.

steps.title: RMM Tool Installation
steps.description: AnyDesk/ScreenConnect downloaded via browser and executed.

steps.title: RMM Execution Alert
steps.description: Unauthorized RMM tool detected by endpoint monitoring.

steps.title: Service Installation
steps.description: RMM tool creates Windows service for persistent access.

steps.title: Remote Access Channel
steps.description: C2 channel established through legitimate RMM infrastructure.

steps.title: RMM Removal
steps.description: CLAW kills processes, removes persistence, blocks RMM domains.

steps.title: Session Analysis
steps.description: Analyze RMM session logs for data accessed and commands executed.

steps.title: Application Control
steps.description: Deploy app whitelisting to block unapproved RMM tools.

steps.title: User Awareness
steps.description: Targeted training on callback phishing recognition.
